channel.title: Investing on Knowledge Base
channel.description: Recent content in Investing on Knowledge Base

item.title: Growth Is the Pie. The Exit Multiple Is What Someone Pays for It.
item.author: shrijit@umich.edu (Shrijit Patel)
item.description: Your return decomposes into two factors. One you can analyze. One you're essentially guessing — and at high entry multiples, it's already working against you.

item.title: A Checklist for High-Quality Stocks
item.author: shrijit@umich.edu (Shrijit Patel)
item.description: 20 filters for finding businesses worth holding for a decade — with examples from Indian and global markets.

item.title: Investing Frameworks
item.author: shrijit@umich.edu (Shrijit Patel)
item.description: A living collection of mental models I use to evaluate businesses and time positions.

item.title: The Margin Framework
item.author: shrijit@umich.edu (Shrijit Patel)
item.description: Eight layers for reading margins properly — from picking the right industry to stress-testing durability through the cycle.

item.title: The Two Engine Framework
item.author: shrijit@umich.edu (Shrijit Patel)
item.description: Stock prices are driven by two engines — EPS growth and PE expansion. Multi-baggers need both firing at once.
